result.summary: Found several visual issues, mostly around overlapping fixed elements and readability near the bottom of the page.

issues.description: The floating “SCROLL DOWN” pill overlaps the legal/disclaimer text near the bottom of the promo section, making that content difficult to read.
issues.suggestion: Move the scroll prompt higher, hide it once the user has scrolled into the lower section, or reserve vertical space so it does not cover legal copy.

issues.description: The legal/disclaimer text is extremely small and low-contrast against the yellow/orange background, making it nearly unreadable on mobile.
issues.suggestion: Increase the font size, improve contrast, and consider placing the legal text on a cleaner solid background.

issues.description: The fixed bottom navigation takes up a large amount of vertical space and appears to crowd or cover the lower page content area.
issues.suggestion: Add adequate bottom padding to the page content equal to the sticky nav height, or reduce the nav height on mobile.

issues.description: Some decorative elements, such as the baseball on the right, are partially clipped by the viewport edge.
issues.suggestion: Adjust the positioning or scale of decorative graphics so they remain fully visible or intentionally crop them more cleanly.

issues.description: The top header is visually crowded with multiple logos, state text, hamburger menu, and a large Join Now button competing for space.
issues.suggestion: Simplify the header layout on mobile, reduce logo sizes, or consolidate secondary branding to improve spacing and hierarchy.
